across.clue: Ordinary means normal, or not special in any way.
to move closer to someone or something.
To make someone or something completely different usually in a way that makes them more attractive easier to use etc.
Your personality is what you are like and how you behave.
A fairly large or impressive amount of money | a ___ sum
involving or consisting of many people things or parts.
A dialect is a form of a language spoken in a particular area.
If something is invalid, it is not correct.
A reason is a statement or fact that explains why something is the way it is, or why someone does, thinks, or says something.
A current is a steady and constant flow of air or water in a river or ocean.

down.clue: An accessory is a thing that is added to another thing to make it look better.
a short or temporary period when you fail or forget to do things in the right way.
Profound means deep or very intelligent.
an unreasonable opinion or feeling especially the feeling of not liking a particular group of people
A sudden feeling of enthusiasm or a new idea that helps you to do or create something.
An interview is a formal meeting to ask someone questions.
Luggage is bags and suitcases used for travel.
Yearly celebration of a marriage | ___ anniversary
An invoice is a bill for goods or services.
To collect means to bring things together from different places.
